mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tenant_model_candidate_mapping(tenant_id, tenant_model_id, provider_channel_model_id, enabled, remark, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at) VALUES(#{tenantId}, #{tenantModelId}, #{providerChannelModelId}, #{enabled}, #{remark}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id, tenant_id, tenant_model_id, provider_channel_model_id, enabled, remark, deleted_at, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at FROM tenant_model_candidate_mapping WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT m.id, m.tenant_id, m.tenant_model_id, m.provider_channel_model_id, cm.provider_channel_id, c.name AS channel_name, b.protocol AS channel_protocol, cm.upstream_model_id, cm.upstream_display_name, cm.supports_streaming, cm.supports_tool_calling, cm.supports_vision, cm.supports_cache, m.enabled, (cm.enabled = TRUE AND cm.deleted_at IS NULL AND c.enabled = TRUE AND c.deleted_at IS NULL) AS candidate_available, m.remark, m.created_at, m.updated_at FROM tenant_model_candidate_mapping m JOIN provider_channel_model cm ON cm.id = m.provider_channel_model_id JOIN provider_channel c ON c.id = cm.provider_channel_id JOIN provider_base_url b ON b.id = c.provider_base_url_id WHERE m.tenant_model_id = #{tenantModelId} AND m.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY m.created_at DESC, m.id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE tenant_model_candidate_mapping SET enabled = #{enabled}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE tenant_model_candidate_mapping SET remark = #{remark}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE tenant_model_candidate_mapping SET deleted_at = NOW(), updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW(), enabled = FALSE WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tenant_model_candidate_mapping WHERE tenant_model_id = #{tenantModelId} AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT cm.id, cm.tenant_id, cm.provider_channel_id, cm.upstream_model_id, cm.upstream_display_name, cm.source_type, cm.supports_streaming, cm.supports_tool_calling, cm.supports_vision, cm.supports_cache, cm.enabled, cm.deleted_at, cm.created_at, cm.updated_at FROM tenant_model_candidate_mapping m JOIN provider_channel_model cm ON cm.id = m.provider_channel_model_id JOIN provider_channel c ON c.id = cm.provider_channel_id WHERE m.tenant_model_id = #{tenantModelId} AND m.enabled = TRUE AND m.deleted_at IS NULL AND cm.enabled = TRUE AND cm.deleted_at IS NULL AND c.enabled = TRUE AND c.deleted_at IS NULL
